item.title: Manufacturer – FIBC, Woven Sack & Mulch Film Punching Machine
item.description: Armstrong is a leading manufacturer of FIBC machines (Jumbo), woven sack, PP/HDPE bag making machines, heavy-duty bag closers, etc., with 40+ years of expertise.

item.title: About Us | Armstrong
item.description: With over 43 years of experience, Armstrong is a trusted manufacturer and exporter of finishing machinery & spare parts for PP/FIBC and woven-sack industries.

item.title: Our Infrastructure | Armstrong
item.description: From single-unit machines to full-line systems, our robust and scalable infrastructure helps us get you engineering solutions that reduce labor involvement

item.title: Our Certifications | Armstrong
item.description: At Armstrong, certifications reflect more than compliance and showcase our commitment to global quality standards, reliability, and customer trust.

item.description: Explore our product lists at Armstrong like FIBC Machines, Woven Sack Machines, Sewing Machines, Mulch Film Punching Machine, Bag Closing Machines & many more.

item.title: FIBC Machines – Big Bag Filling Machine For Jumbo Bags
item.description: FIBC machines for jumbo bags offer heavy-duty solutions for 50–1000kg big bag filling, featuring automated stitching, dust-free filling & high-speed cutting.

item.description: Armstrong manufactures a wide range of Woven Sack Machines, including stitching machines, newlong bag sewing machines, gusset BCS machines, and BCS machines.

item.description: Heavy Duty Bag Closing Machines are available single and double needle automatic bag closing with auto start for rice, sugar, flour, grains and fertilizers.

item.description: Armstrong is a manufacturer of a range of machines for PP/PE woven sacks, which includes the Needle Loom Machine with HMI and the Ribbon Making Needle Loom Machine.

item.description: Armstrong designs and manufactures a wide range of Tarpaulin Machines, including Auto Rewinding & Cutting Machine, The Lamination Machine, etc.

item.title: FIBC Jumbo Bag Cleaning Machine | Armstrong
item.description: FIBC bag cleaning machines are designed for efficient cleaning of jumbo bags & FIBC bags, used to remove loose threads & foreign particles from inside the bags.

item.title: FIBC Bag Rolling Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures bag rolling machines that are designed to quickly roll FIBC bags and make it easier to roll one & two-loop bags for automatic filling lines.

item.title: Bag Testing Machine for HDPE and PP Bags
item.description: Armstrong Bag Testing Machine tests strength and durability of HDPE and PP bags, with load capacities of 50Kgf, 100Kgf, 250Kgf, 250Kgf, and above.

item.title: FIBC Belt Marking And Cutting Machine Manufacturer
item.description: Armstrong manufactures FIBC belt cutting machine designed for speed, accuracy, & reliability, it can cut up to 10 webbing belts at once with multi-point marking.

item.title: Electrical Bale Press Machine Supplier | Armstrong
item.description: We manufacture Electrical Bale Press Machines are designed to complement large-scale baling systems, reduces manual effort, and improves overall productivity.

item.description: Armstrong FIBC fabric cutting machine delivers high-speed, fully automatic cutting for FIBC jumbo bags with precise cutting length control.

item.title: FIBC / PP Fabric Reversing Machine | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures PP fabric reversing machines, which are precision-engineered, semi-automatic solutions for simplifying the jumbo bag reversing process.

item.title: FIBC Handle Wrapping Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures FIBC Handle Wrapping Machines for One-Loop or Two-Loop Big Bags, which significantly reduce labor costs through automatic thread cutting.

item.title: FIBC Jumbo Bag Liner Opening Machine | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures the Liner Bag Opener Machine, which is an essential tool for modern FIBC bag production lines and sticking PE liners into PP FIBC bags.

item.description: Armstrong is a leading manufacturer of FIBC Fabric Lamination Machines, which are engineered for precision lamination & coating of flexible packaging materials.

item.title: FIBC Liner Sealing Cutting Machine | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures FIBC Liner Sealing Cutting Machines, which are designed for efficient bottom sealing and lengthwise cutting of tubular lay-flat liners.

item.title: FIBC Flexographic Printing Machine | Armstrong
item.description: Our Flexographic printing machine is a specialized printing system designed for printing large-scale bags, often made of woven polypropylene, polyethylene, etc.

item.title: Form Fit Bottle Shape Liner Sealing Machine
item.description: This Bottle Shape Liner Sealing Machine is designed to create precisely shaped liners for FIBC big bags, ensuring clean, dust-free storage and transport.

item.description: Armstrong manufactures the Form Fit Liner Sealing Machine, a fully automatic, high-precision solution engineered for producing bottle-shaped liners.

item.description: At Armstrong, we manufacture Hydraulic Bale Press Machines, which are heavy-duty vertical balers engineered for compact baling of FIBC bags & plastic packaging.

item.description: Armstrong manufactures an Automatic Liner Sealing Machine, which is designed for producing and sealing bottle-shaped liners for FIBC inner liners.

item.title: Liner Testing Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: Armstrong manufactures liner testing machines designed specifically for the FIBC industry, ensuring quality control and operational efficiency.

item.title: Roll to Roll Liner Sealing Perforation Machine
item.description: The Roll-to-Roll Liner Sealing Perforation Machine is a fully automatic system engineered for precise bottom sealing and inline perforation of LDPE/HDPE liners.

item.title: Spout Punching Machine | Semi-Auto Spout Cutting Machine
item.description: Armstrong designs the Spout Punching Machines, which are used for cutting jumbo bags with punching units for O-hole, X-cut, circular, and liner cuts.

item.title: Suspended Shape Liner Sealing Machine | Armstrong
item.description: At Armstrong, the Suspended Liner Sealing Machines are engineered to deliver superior sealing results while optimizing productivity and reducing errors.

item.title: Tensile Strength Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: The Tensile Strength Machine is specifically designed to test the load-bearing capacity of FIBC bag belts or webbing, which can handle weights of several tons.

item.title: Liner Sealing Machine with Top & Bottom Spout and Body Flanges
item.description: Our Liner Sealing Machines with Top and Bottom Spout and Body Flanges are a semi-automatic solution engineered for precision sealing in FIBC liners.

item.title: Automatic Ultrasonic Fabric Cutting Machine for PP Woven & FIBC Bags
item.description: Industrial ultrasonic fabric cutting machine for technical textiles, PP woven sacks, and FIBC bags with smooth sealed edges and accurate automated cutting.

item.title: Armstrong AI Defect Detection System
item.description: The Armstrong AI Defect Detection System is an advanced solution that identifies defects such as black scars, scratches, dirt, holes, and 2mm × 2mm leakages.

item.title: BCS Machine – Woven Bag Cutting & Stitching Machine
item.description: Armstrong Woven Bag Cutting & Stitching Machine delivers precise, high-speed cutting, folding, stitching, and stacking for PP, HDPE, and BOPP woven bags.

item.title: Gusset BCS Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: Designed with PLC touch screen control, auto roll lifting, and I-Mark for accurate cutting, our gusseted BCS machine ensures smooth, error-free performance.

item.title: Center Tuber Pasting Machine | Armstrong
item.description: The Automatic Tuber Machine is a high-speed, fully automatic solution for converting coated flat woven fabric into flat or gusseted tubular rolls or cut pieces.

item.title: Bag Cutting & Sewing Conversion Line Machine
item.description: ARMSTRONG designs the Auto Bag Conversion Line machine that converts tubular PP/HDPE and BOPP fabrics into finished bags with a bottom fold and stitch.

item.title: BCS Liner Insertion Machine Manufacturer | Armstrong
item.description: ARMSTRONG is a leading BCS liner insertion machine manufacturer providing fully automatic solutions for inserting PE liners into PP woven bags.

item.title: High Speed Roll to Roll Gusseting Machine | Armstrong
item.description: The High-Speed Roll-to-Roll Gusseting Machine delivers precise “M” or “W” side gussets on PP tubular rolls, including laminated, unlaminated, and BOPP.

item.description: Armstrong Designs Piece-to-Piece Pinch Bottom Bag Making Machines for producing high-quality PP woven bags for rice, pet food, fertilizer, and more.

item.description: Armstrong High-Speed Woven Sack Lamination Machine delivers precise, high-speed lamination for FIBC and PP/HDPE woven bag production with consistent quality.

item.description: Armstrong designs Roll-to-Piece Pinch Bottom Bag Making Machine for producing durable PP woven bags for rice, pet food, fertilizer, and more.

item.description: Armstrong is a leading manufacturer of 6-color flexo printing machines, which a high-speed solution designed for multicolor printing on PP/HDPE woven sacks.

item.title: Six Colors Roll to Roll Flexographic Printing Machine
item.description: Six-color flexographic roll-to-roll machine offers high-speed, continuous multi-color printing designed to meet the needs of woven bag manufacturers worldwide.

item.description: Our ultrasonic hemming machine is powered by cutting-edge ultrasonic technology that improves production efficiency, minimizes errors, and optimizes output.

item.description: Our fabric folding machines are fully automatic solutions to fold both edges of flat fabric, followed by precise hemming for strong, durable seams.

item.description: Our Bale Press machines are engineered to manage and employ advanced technology to compress woven bags tightly and optimizing space for storage and transport.

item.title: Woven Sack Flexographic Printing Machine Manufacturer
item.description: Armstrong manufactures a Flexographic Printing Machine that is built for high-quality, high-speed printing on laminated and unlaminated PP/HDPE woven sacks.

item.description: The Bag Sewing Machine, designed by Armstrong, is a high-speed, double-needle, four-thread chain stitch machine designed for precision and efficiency.

item.description: The High-Speed Single Needle Union Feed Lockstitch Machine, engineered by Armstrong for stitching thick, heavy materials with exceptional accuracy and speed.

item.description: Armstrong Jumbo Bag Loop Sewing Machines are high-speed, heavy-duty system for precise, reliable FIBC loop stitching in continuous industrial bag manufacturing.

item.description: This single-needle double-thread plain-feed chain Stitch Sewing Machine is purpose-built for seaming and hemming light to heavy fabrics such as FIBC big bags.

item.description: The Single Needle Flat Bed Sewing Machine is built for seaming and hemming of light to heavy materials, including multi-wall paper, PP/PE woven cloth, etc.

item.description: Armstrong manufactures mulch film punching machines with PLC control, up to 1200 mm film width, custom hole sizes, and fast precision for agriculture.

item.description: Manufactures heavy-duty bag turning & tilting conveyor machines for efficient industrial bag handling, integrating stitching, weighing & metal detection.
